WelcomeDesc:
A sleek audio visualizer that turns your music
into floating light bars.
Tut1Content:
1. Play some music through your speakers or headphones.

2. NekoBeats automatically captures your system audio — no setup needed!

3. The floating bars will appear on your screen, reacting to the music in real time.

4. The control panel lets you customize everything — colors, bar count, height, effects and more.
Tip1: VIZ tab — adjust bar count, height, opacity and spacing
Tip2: COLORS tab — pick bar colors, enable rainbow or gradient
Tip3: FX tab — bloom, particles, circle mode, fade effect
Tip4: AUDIO tab — sensitivity, smooth speed, latency comp
Tip5: WINDOW tab — click-through, FPS limit, monitor selection
Tip6: PRESETS tab — load .nbp and .nbbar preset files
Tut3Content:
• Enable Click-Through so bars don't block your mouse

• Use Streaming Mode to capture NekoBeats in OBS

• The system tray icon lets you show/hide the control panel

• Check for updates anytime via the tray icon menu

• Share your presets at catsdevs.online/NekoBeats-V2/community-themes.html
FinishContent:
Play some music and watch the magic happen!

Made with ❤️ by justdev-chris
